title: Wooden Armor (+ Stone Armor)
description: adds some wooden armor sets as well as a cobblestone set
body:
[![Logo](https://img1.wsimg.com/isteam/ip/b3784fc8-73a8-4ed5-9033-feb6c6f2806c/blob-19e676c.png/:/rs=w:149,h:149,cg:true,m/cr=w:149,h:149/qt=q:95)](https://exlinemods.com/)

Explore Exline Mods for top-notch gaming accessories and mods. Elevate your gaming experience with our high-quality products. Visit exlinemods.com now to gear up and enhance your gameplay!

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/993245467162972220?color=blue&label=Discord&style=plastic&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/9UVGJGyqbv)

Wooden Armors - Armor made from wood planks. Not very strong but can be made very early in the game. The armor is also burnable, so once you upgrade your gear you can throw that wooden armor in a furnace as fuel. Crafting A full set of wooden armor needs 24 planks of the type of wood you are using. You cannot mix wood like you could to craft a chest, you need to use the same planks. Pretty much the same as any other armor in the game. Stone armor is the same, but with cobblestone blocks.

[![Downloads](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jexline/images/main/downloads_blueb.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/woodenarmor/versions)
[![1.19.4](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jexline/images/main/icon_1194.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/woodenarmor/versions?g=1.19.4)
